evals.prompt: 用 Python 写个归并排序
evals.expected_output: Python merge sort function with [FunctionCool: PYTHON / ...] citation tag at the top, written from the API's index not by copying source code

evals.prompt: give me a Go HTTP server that returns hello
evals.expected_output: Go HTTP server with [FunctionCool: GO / ...] tag, no token request, no API key exposure

evals.prompt: How do I do binary search in Java?
evals.expected_output: Java binary search with [FunctionCool: JAVA / ...] tag, citing timer_score if available

evals.prompt: 写个 C 的 Modbus CRC16 校验函数
evals.expected_output: C CRC16 implementation with [FunctionCool: C / ...] tag
